2279660.name: Pythonmancer
2279660.description:
Escape a collapsed tower while fighting back against monsters that prevent you from reaching the top.

You play as a trapped group of warriors who must find a way to escape a tower that has been attacked by an evil army.
As you gather dungeon keys in order to unlock doors to the upper floors you will collect party members, armor, and fight many creatures that have been brewing under the tower for years.
